turns.name: WILLIAM REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 89-1905 Wisconsin Public Intervenor verus Mortier will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON WHITE
turns.text: As the opinion on file with the clerk will indicate, we reverse the judgment of the Supreme Court of Wisconsin. Justice Scalia has filed an opinion concurring in the judgment.
